arts.sum: Boavista come into this game on the back of six consecutive defeats and in last place in the league table. However, the Axadrezados are hopeful on turning things around as 9 new signings and a new coa...

arts.ttl: Strugglers Boavista sign nine players in one day
arts.sum: Boavista adopt a bold strategy in their fight against relegation from the Portuguese top flight - signing nine players in one day.
